options.name: -buffer
options.description: Name of buffer specified for all assign nets, disable automatical buffer selection

options.name: -buffering
options.description: This option enables assign net buffering. The buffer can be automatically selected unless buffer is specified by user.

options.name: -ignorePortConstraints
options.description: Allow to ignore all port constraints during assign removal

options.name: -net
options.description: Name of net. Single or list of names, scalar or bus names, wildcart * is allowed

options.name: -netBuffer
options.description: Name of buffer specified for specific net given in option -net. This option, if specified, should come after option -net.

options.name: -prefix
options.description: User specified prefix for buffer names

options.name: -report
options.description: Report list of all buffers and assign nets that were replaced by the buffers.
